memoryArtifacts.headline: Ambrose Fowler and Jane Alvord History follows:
memoryArtifacts.description:
AMBROSE FOWLER was born about 1618, of Dalbury, Lees, Derbyshire, England, to William Fowler (1572-1660) and Sarah Neeld (1599-1638.) He married Jane Alvord, 26 May 1646, in Windsor, Massachusetts.

A …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Alford於1575年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親William John Alford V30歲，母親Amy Seeley33歲。他於1618年5月11日與Frances Joan Hawkins在英國薩默塞特阿希爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1657年5月27日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年82歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Alford于1575年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲William John Alford V30岁，母亲Amy Seeley33岁。他于1618年5月11日与Frances Joan Hawkins在英国薩默塞特阿希爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1657年5月27日在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓享年82岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特特斯陶頓。

nameMeanings.name: Alford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places called Alford, for example in Somerset, Cheshire and Lincolnshire. The first is named with the Old English female personal name Ealdgȳth + ford ‘ford’. See also Alvord .

variants.name: Alvord
meanings: English (southwestern): variant of   Alford   1; the spelling reflects the southwestern English dialect pronunciation.
History: This surname was brought to North America by Alexander Alvord, who came from Devon or Somerset to Windsor, CT, c. 1645. He had many prominent descendants.

variants.name: Halford
meanings: English (mainly Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Halford. Most, for example those in Warwickshire, Devon, and Shropshire, or the lost place Haleford in Pembury (Kent), are named from Old English halh ‘nook, recess’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: variant of Alford with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Alford was born in 1575, in Somerset, England, his father, William John Alford V, was 30 and his mother, Amy Seeley, was 33. He married Frances Joan Hawkins on 11 May 1618, in Ashill, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 May 1657, in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82, and was buried in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Alford est né en 1575, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William John Alford V, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Amy Seeley, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Frances Joan Hawkins le 11 mai 1618, à Ashill, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1657, à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Whitestaunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: Bristol, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Alford 1575 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William John Alford V 30 und seine Mutter Amy Seeley 33. Er hat am 11. Mai 1618 in Ashill, Somerset, England Frances Joan Hawkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1657 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitestaunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Alfordが1575年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父William John Alford Vは30歳，母Amy Seeleyは33歳であった。1618年5月11日にイギリスソメルセトアシュイルでFrances Joan Hawkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年5月27日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンで82歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトウィテスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Alford(이)가 1575년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William John Alford V(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy Seeley(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1618년 5월 11일 영국 서머세트 애시에서 Frances Joan Hawkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1657년 5월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 휘츠타운턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Frances Joan Hawkins em 11 de maio de 1618, em Ashill, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Alford родился в 1575 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени William John Alford V было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy Seeley, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Joan Hawkins 11 мая 1618 г. в местности ашилл, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 мая 1657 г. в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности уитстаунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
